alkylation reagent: 50 mM iodoacetamide (30 min at room temperature in the dark)
alkylation concentration: 50 mM iodoacetamide (30 min at room temperature in the dark)
enrichment method: subjected to affinity purification, followed by quantitative mass spectrometry
labeling: stable isotope labeling by amino acids in cell culture (SILAC)
reduction reagent: alkylation of cysteine residues with 100 mM DTT
reduction concentration: alkylation of cysteine residues with 100 mM DTT
